statement.en: A FFT-based variational procedure for homogenization of maxwellian viscoelastic composites

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper describes a computational methodology (FFT-based variational homogenization) applied to material modeling. The core mathematical framework (FFT, variational calculus) is CLASS-A formalizable, but application to Maxwell viscoelastic composite homogenization requires empirical validation and material-specific calibration not yet established in the abstract. Status: preprint (2026-04-25) without peer validation confirmation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間と周波数が絡み合い、弾性と粘性が一つの呼吸となって振動する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 周波数領域と物理空間が同心円で踊り、複合体の内部構造が波となって共鳴する。
